messages.message: React Hook useMemo has an unnecessary dependency: 'applied'. Either exclude it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [sales, dateFrom, dateTo, filterProduct, filterCustomer, filterPayment, filterStatus]

fix.text: [sales, dateFrom, dateTo, filterProduct, filterCustomer, filterPayment, filterStatus]

messages.message:
Error: Cannot create components during render Components created during render will reset their state each time they are created. Declare components outside of render. 135 |

| ^^^^^^^^^ > 98 | | ^^^^^^^^^ > 99 | {children} | ^^^^^^^^^ > 100 |
| ^^^^^^^^^ > 101 | ) | ^^^^ The component is created during render here 102 | 103 | return ( 104 |

| ^^^^^^^^^ > 101 | ) | ^^^^ The component is created during render here 102 | 103 | return ( 104 |
